# @nmipayments/nmi-pay-react

React components for NMI Embedded Payments

## Installation

```bash
npm install @nmipayments/nmi-pay-react
```

**Peer Dependencies:**
- `react` >= 16.8.0
- `react-dom` >= 16.8.0

## Documentation

For complete documentation, integration guides, API reference, and examples, please visit the [NMI Developer Documentation](https://docs.nmi.com/docs/payment-component).
